title: Apply Work-Quickie logo across the app

requirements.summary: Replace text-only or placeholder logo with the uploaded Work-Quickie logo image in the app header and landing page
acceptanceCriteria: The Work-Quickie logo image is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png
The sticky header in Layout.tsx displays the logo image instead of any text-only or placeholder logo
The LandingPage.tsx hero section displays the logo image
The logo image in the header links to the home route ('/')
The logo renders clearly at appropriate sizes without distortion on both desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded Work-Quickie logo image (lightning bolt graphic with 'Work-Quickie' red text) as a static asset. This file will be referenced by Layout.tsx and LandingPage.tsx components.

Replace the existing text-only or placeholder logo in the sticky header with an element that references frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png. The logo should render at height 40px, be wrapped in a Link to '/', and include appropriate alt text. Ensure responsive sizing works correctly on mobile viewports.

Replace any existing text-only or placeholder logo in the hero section with an element that references frontend/public/assets/generated/work-quickie-logo.png. The logo should render at height 64px with appropriate alt text and maintain aspect ratio without distortion on all screen sizes.
